candidate.title: Five Eyes cyber security agencies statement
candidate.text: As the leaders of the Five Eyes cyber security agencies, we are united in our call to action: the evolving landscape of artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming cyber risk, and we must act swiftly to remain ahead.A call to actionWhile Al will help us improve cyber defence over time, it also accelerates the speed, scale, and sophistication of cyber threats.Frontier Al models are anticipated to exceed current industry expectations, fundamentally transforming both offensive and defensive cyber capabilities. The timeline is not years, it is months.In this environment, cyber resilience

candidate.text: Human Rights Belong at the Centre of Australia’s AI Future Human Rights Commissioner Lorraine Finlay says Australia's AI framework must place human rights at its centre. Human rights Opinion piece Listen Opinion piece summary Australia's approach to AI should be shaped by human rights as well as economic and technological considerations.
